entityTypes.label: Herb Garden
entityTypes.description: Herbs, garden plants, and shrubs used in correspondence systems.

relationshipTypes.label: Corresponds To
relationshipTypes.description: A direct symbolic or structural correspondence.

relationshipTypes.label: Refines
relationshipTypes.description: A subsection or refinement of a broader correspondence entry.
